name: Ambush
description: One of your opponent's creatures gets the drop on you.
condition: Opponent starts with a <3-cost card from its deck into a random lane.

name: Magicka Advantage
description: You have encountered a powerful mage who starts with extra magicka.
condition: Opponent starts with 2 extra max magicka.

name: Power Struggle
description: The battlefield seethes with mystical power, giving both players extra magicka.
condition: Both players start with 1 extra max magicka.

name: Resourceful
description: You arrive the arena first and hastily set up some defenses.
condition: You start with a 0/2 Makeshift Defenses in your hand.

name: Close Quarters
description: A gladiator is ready to face you.
condition: Opponent starts with a Crowd Favorite in a random lane.

name: Duel
description: Each of you warriors is ready for battle
condition: Both player start with a Crowd Favorite in opposite lanes.

name: Guard
description: Your opponent comes to battle with defenses ready.
condition: Opponent starts with an Altmer Protector in the left lane.

name: Shields Up
description: You each come to battle with defenses ready.
condition: Both players start with an Altmer Protector in the left lane.

name: All Out Brawl
description: Both of you come to battle with bottles at the ready.
condition: Both players start with Broken Bottles in play.

name: Hero's Call
description: Three heroes come to aid you into battle.
condition: Three random Unique creature cards are shuffled in both player's deck.

name: Sheogorath's Game
description: Both players start with a mysterious staff in play.
condition: Both players start with Wabbajack in play.

name: On a Roll
condition: Both players start with a Sweet Roll in both lanes.

name: Power Unleashed
description: The battlefield is overflowing with mystical power, giving both players THREE extra magicka.
condition: Both players start with 3 extra max magicka.

name: Spawning Pool
condition: Both player start with a Slaughterfish in opposite lanes.
